nasb.text: Let them praise His name with dancing; Let them sing praises to Him with timbrel and lyre.

esv.text: Let them praise his name with dancing, making melody to him with tambourine and lyre!

cnv.text: 願他們一邊跳舞，一邊讚美他的名， 擊鼓彈琴歌頌他。

ccb.text: 愿他们跳舞赞美祂的名， 击鼓弹琴歌颂祂。

csbs.text: 愿他们用舞蹈赞美他的名， 用铃鼓和竖琴歌颂他！
